verses.3: He heals the broken in heart,
verses.4: He counts the number of the stars.
verses.5: Great is our Lord, and mighty in power.
verses.7: Sing to the LORD with thanksgiving.
verses.8: who covers the sky with clouds,
verses.9: He provides food for the livestock,
verses.10: He doesn’t delight in the strength of the horse.
verses.11: The LORD takes pleasure in those who fear him,
verses.13: For he has strengthened the bars of your gates.
verses.14: He makes peace in your borders.
verses.15: He sends out his commandment to the earth.
verses.17: He hurls down his hail like pebbles.
verses.18: He sends out his word, and melts them.
verses.19: He shows his word to Jacob,
verses.20: He has not done this for just any nation.
